name: idea-spotlight
style: Magazine-editorial. Fixed 8-slide arc optimized for daily Idea of the Day. Lime + lavender accents.

slides.description: Date line + lime 'Idea of the Day' eyebrow + big idea name + pitch + 3 lavender signal chips.
Search volume + 90-day trend cards with lime→emerald sparkline. Callout line below.
4-cell grid (build time, price, audience, infra) + full-width stack row.
Aubergine terminal-style panel with a copy-paste Claude prompt. Lavender header, lime variables.
Price × Customers equation. Answer block is lime with black text — dominant moment.
3-persona grid. Each card: avatar, who, pain, 'will pay $X' line in lime.
Lime eyebrow + 2-line headline (lime accent) + lime button + URL.

notes: Fixed 8-slide narrative arc. Don't add/remove — the flow breaks.
If the topic needs variable slides, switch to wmv-default.
The prompt slide (05) needs real copy-paste-ready text — this is the skill's one chance to give tangible value.
